div.h3: O(1) Insertion, Amortized O(1) Tick Processing

div.p: 1. Calculate elapsed slots ────────────────────────── elapsed = now - base_time slots_elapsed = elapsed / tick_rate
2. Process each elapsed slot ────────────────────────── For each slot in [last..current]:

ul.li: If deadline expired: Add to wakers
Else: Re-file to correct wheel slot

div.p: 3. Wake expired timers ────────────────────────── For waker in expired_list: waker.wake()
4. Return next timeout ────────────────────────── Calculate min(deadline - now) for scheduling hardware interrupt.
Calculate target slot ────────────────────────── offset = duration / slot_duration target = (current + offset) % 64

• Power of 2: num_slots mask-based wrapping for speed. • Range Overflow: Timers > wheel range refiled to last slot. • Concurrency: Single-producer/Single-consumer or Mutex-protected. • Tick Drift: tick() must account for missed intervals.
TimerEntry ──────────── deadline: t+10ms waker: Arc<dyn Wake>
TimerEntry ──────────── deadline: t+11ms waker: Arc<dyn Wake>
TimerEntry ──────────── deadline: t+11ms waker: Arc<dyn Wake>
TimerEntry ──────────── deadline: t+19ms waker: Arc<dyn Wake>
